message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "JobManager" as JobManager
package "Process/Application" as Process {
}
package "ESDM" as ESDM {
}
participant "Post Processing" as PostProcessing
database "Storage System" as Storage
actor "Observer" as Observer

== Observer ==
activate Observer
Observer -> Observer : collects observations
deactivate Observer
Observer -> Storage : (may write directly)
Observer -> ESDM : write observation t
activate ESDM
ESDM -> ESDM : (transform for efficiency)
ESDM -> Storage : write container for observation t
deactivate ESDM

== Simulation Runs ==
activate JobManager
JobManager -> JobManager : periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT)
JobManager -> Process : allocates resources and calls
deactivate JobManager
activate Process
Process -> ESDM : read IN=x
activate ESDM
ESDM -> Storage : read
Storage --> ESDM : return
deactivate ESDM
ESDM --> Process : return
Process -> Process : compute
Process -> ESDM : write async OUT=y
deactivate Process

== Value-added products ==
activate ESDM
ESDM -> PostProcessing : make available
activate PostProcessing
PostProcessing -> PostProcessing : perform analysis
PostProcessing -> Storage : (may write directly)
PostProcessing --> ESDM : return result
deactivate PostProcessing
ESDM --> Process : return
deactivate ESDM
note right of Process: multiple iterations

== Finalise ==
Storage -> User : OUT files become visible

@enduml
```
